heading: Consolidation of land offices
label: 124 Consolidation of land offices
text: It shall be the duty of the Secretary of the Interior to consolidate the district land offices where practicable and consistent with the public interests.
notes: Appropriations, , required the Secretary of the Interior to consolidate the district land offices so as to bring the total compensation of the registers and receivers for the fiscal year 1894, within the appropriation made therefor by the sundry Civil Appropriation Act for that year, which was fixed at $520,000.Act Mar. 3, 1893, ch. 20827 Stat. 591
